blocks.heading: Tonight’s Department Leads
blocks.body: Key staff supporting the donor preview and blackout rehearsal.

items.title: Daria Pell
items.body: Controls sponsor communications, donor packets, and preview-floor presentation materials.

items.title: Mara Ives
items.body: Supervises cameras, guest flow, and restricted-access compliance.

items.title: Jules Arden
items.body: Oversees ambient installation and timed audio cues.

items.title: Tomas Reed
items.body: Assigned to propagation support and exterior irrigation checks.
